title: COPY.md frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of COPY.md: the voice/tone system + the per-screen string map. Screen-coverage is checked separately by scripts/check_copy.py against the confirmed screen list.

tone.description: context -> how the voice flexes (success, error, empty, destructive, ...)

screens.description: screenId -> region/string tree. Each screen entry must be a non-empty object.
